CustomField.description: Get-or-start dedup window in minutes. A start with a correlation key matching a recently-terminal instance (Completed/Failed/Compensated/Cancelled/ContinuedAsNew) within this many minutes returns the existing instance Id instead of spawning a duplicate. Active instances are always deduped regardless of this value. Set to 0 (minimum) to preserve active-only behavior.
CustomField.label: Dedup Window Minutes
